opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Covered a $1,200 ruined couch for $49 — looks brand new
opportunities.before_state: Worn, pet-hair-covered couch with stains and torn fabric that ruins the living room
opportunities.after_state: Tightly fitted, clean cover that looks like new upholstery — pets, kids, guests no problem
buyer_intent_keywords: couch cover that stays in place
opportunities.why_now: Summer hosting season peaks in June and pet shedding season drives couch-protection searches; Mamma Mia's 24-30% commission makes this the single highest-ROI SKU in the catalog.

opportunities.specific_product: boho/spa shower curtain + non-slip bath mat + brushed-gold rings set
opportunities.transformation_hook: $43 bathroom makeover — interior designers say ditch these 3 things
opportunities.before_state: Builder-grade plastic liner, bare floor, chrome rings — the exact combo Real Simple flagged as making bathrooms look outdated
opportunities.after_state: Textured linen-look curtain, plush mat, matte-gold hardware — spa-hotel feel for under $50
opportunities.why_now: Real Simple just published 'items making your bathroom look outdated' — exact search intent match driving high-conversion traffic to bathroom refresh bundles right now.

opportunities.transformation_hook: Finally slept through the night — $89 vs $3,000 new mattress
opportunities.before_state: Waking up sweaty, flipping the pillow every hour, neck pain from improper side-sleeper support during summer heat
opportunities.after_state: Cool-to-touch surface, adjustable fill for side sleepers, full night of uninterrupted sleep even without AC running all night
buyer_intent_keywords: best cooling pillow for hot sleepers
pillow for side sleepers neck pain
opportunities.why_now: Real Simple's active 'can't sleep in summer heat' pin is generating high engagement this week and June heat waves spike cooling-sleep search volume 40-60% above baseline.

opportunities.specific_product: star-pattern throw pillow covers + red-white-blue table runner set
opportunities.transformation_hook: $27 transforms any living room for the 4th — ships before July 4
opportunities.before_state: Plain neutral living room or dining table with no seasonal personality heading into the biggest home-entertaining holiday of summer
opportunities.after_state: Coordinated Americana vignette — stars, stripes, vintage-flag palette — ready for July 4th cookout guests
opportunities.why_now: HGTV Pinterest published 4+ Americana/4th-of-July pins this week and July 4 is 25 days out — the buying window is open now and closes hard on July 1.

opportunities.specific_product: ADDLON/Brightech 48-ft warm-white Edison outdoor string lights
opportunities.transformation_hook: $36 turned my dead backyard into a party venue overnight
opportunities.before_state: Dark, bare patio or backyard with a single overhead bulb — unusable after sunset, embarrassing for summer entertaining
opportunities.after_state: Warm Edison-bulb canopy strung between fence posts or umbrella — instant outdoor dining-room ambiance for 4th of July and all summer
opportunities.why_now: Multiple HGTV and BHG pins on outdoor entertaining and 4th of July backyard decor are peaking simultaneously with summer's highest backyard-use weekend stretch.
